name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance Dallas, Texas — US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50,000 with same-day funding at a Detroi...
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical storefront at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, offering short-term lending products designed for consumers needing rapid access to cash. The company has been reviewed by customers seeking emergency funds for medical bills, unexpected expenses, and paycheck gaps. According to their website, they serve borrowers across the credit spectrum, including those with poor credit histories.

The company's service menu includes payday loans (up to $1,000), bad credit loans (up to $50,000), same-day loans, cash advances, and personal loans. They market themselves as an alternative for borrowers who cannot access traditional bank financing. All advertised loan products are unsecured and require no collateral. The company emphasizes a fast approval process, claiming applicants can receive cash within hours of approval.

US Cash Advance distinguishes itself through in-person service with named staff (reviews mention employee Doris), transparent explanation of terms, and a streamlined process—one customer reported completion in under 45 minutes. They accept online applications but also operate a walk-in location with extended hours (8am–9pm weekdays; 10am–7pm weekends). Customer reviews highlight the lack of hidden fees and patient staff interaction, differentiating them from online-only lenders.

However, the company's website contains inconsistencies and red flags. One customer review appears to reference a different lender (Express Payday Loans) under US Cash Advance's name. The contact email (service@env-uscashadvance-compliance.kinsta.cloud) uses a staging/development domain, suggesting potential website infrastructure issues. No specific APR, fees, or repayment terms are disclosed on the public website. The benefits listed (fast access, no credit check, minimum paperwork) are typical marketing claims for payday lenders and do not constitute regulatory advantages. This remains a short-term, high-cost lending product suitable only for emergency situations.
pros: In-person service at Detroit storefront with extended hours (8am–9pm weekdays; 10am–7pm weekends)
Same-day or next-day cash funding reported by customers
Accepts borrowers with bad credit; no credit check loans available
Unsecured loans requiring no collateral or property pledge
Fast approval process: one customer completed application in under 45 minutes
Staff explains repayment terms clearly with no hidden fees disclosed
Loan amounts up to $50,000 available (for bad credit loans category)
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on website—typical payday lending terms likely apply (often 300%+ APR)
Website contains errors and inconsistencies (one review references competitor 'Express Payday Loans'; contact email uses development domain)
Physical location only in Detroit; online applications may route to third-party lenders without guaranteed approval
Short repayment terms typical of payday loans create risk of debt cycles
Customer review mentions cramped waiting area and suggests lack of online pre-approval convenience
best_for: Consumers in Detroit metro area needing emergency cash ($100–$1,000) before next paycheck
Borrowers with poor credit history unable to access bank loans or credit cards
Workers facing unexpected medical bills or emergency expenses requiring same-day funds
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is appropriate for Detroit-area residents facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who cannot access traditional credit and need funds within hours. The critical caveat: payday and cash advance loans carry extremely high interest rates and short repayment terms that frequently trap borrowers in debt cycles; this product should be a last resort only, not a regular borrowing solution.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit storefront
